mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id, t.routine_id, t.title, t.content, t.status_cd, t.priority_cd, t.due_dt, t.assignee_id, t.order_seq, t.rgtr, t.reg_dt, t.last_mdfr, t.last_mdfcn_dt FROM task_mng t WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId}

SELECT t.task_id, t.title, t.status_cd, t.priority_cd, t.due_dt, t.assignee_id, u.nickname AS assignee_nm, t.order_seq FROM task_mng t LEFT JOIN user_mng u ON t.assignee_id = u.user_no WHERE t.routine_id = #{routineId} ORDER BY t.order_seq ASC

SELECT t.task_id, t.title, t.status_cd, t.priority_cd, t.due_dt, t.assignee_id, u.nickname AS assignee_nm, t.order_seq FROM task_mng t LEFT JOIN user_mng u ON t.assignee_id = u.user_no WHERE t.user_no = #{userId} ORDER BY t.due_dt ASC, t.order_seq ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_mng ( routine_id, user_no, title, content, status_cd, priority_cd, due_dt, assignee_id, order_seq, rgtr, reg_dt, last_mdfr, last_mdfcn_dt ) VALUES ( #{routineId}, #{userNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{statusCd}, #{priorityCd}, #{dueDt}, #{assigneeId}, #{orderSeq}, #{rgtr}, NOW(), #{lastMdfr}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE task_mng SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, priority_cd = #{priorityCd}, due_dt = #{dueDt}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, last_mdfr = #{lastMdfr}, last_mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE task_mng SET status_cd = #{statusCd}, last_mdfr = #{lastMdfr}, last_mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
